summary.intent: Migrate the web UI from vanilla JavaScript with HTM tagged templates to TypeScript with JSX/Preact, then iteratively improve type safety by adding enums, typed RPC, typed WebSocket events, and eliminating unsafe casts.
summary.outcome: Full TypeScript/TSX migration completed on branch feat/typescript-migration: 142 TS/TSX files replacing 135 JS files, Vite build pipeline, 0 tsc errors, 0 `as any`, typed RPC (107 methods), typed WS events (28-member enum), ChannelType enum, and Record<string,unknown> reduced from ~159 to 69. local-validate passes including new tsc check.

repo: The project uses Rust's include_dir! to embed static assets — dist/ must be committed so cargo build works without Node.js
The file-size CI check (1500-line limit) only applies to .rs files, not TypeScript/TSX
local-validate.sh requires a git-tracked clean tree to run properly; it auto-detects PR from gh pr view and fails if no PR exists
Biome does formatting and lint but NOT type checking — tsc --noEmit is needed separately for type errors
The share page (share.html) uses its own standalone JS (share-app.mjs, share-theme-init.js, luxon.mjs) separate from the main SPA and should not be deleted
The original page-chat.js referenced sendChat without importing it — a pre-existing latent bug masked by non-strict module loading
git add -A in a shared working directory accidentally staged unrelated in-progress Rust changes from other sessions, requiring a revert commit
GPG-signed commits require YubiKey tap for each commit — automated commit loops will stall waiting for pinentry

code.finding: sourcemap must be disabled in Vite config to prevent 27MB of .map files being committed to dist/ and embedded in the release binary

ChatSendParams and ChatContentPart discriminated union replaces Record<string,unknown> for chat RPC payloads; content parts typed as {type:'text';text:string} | {type:'image_url';image_url:{url:string}}
RpcMethodMap with 107 entries enables sendRpc<'models.list'>() to infer response type at compile time via overloaded signatures
WsEventName enum (28 events) + WsEventPayloadMap enables typed onEvent() where payload type is inferred from event name
shiki_url template variable and DEFAULT_SHIKI_CDN_URL removed since Vite bundles Shiki at build time — CDN allowlist in CSP no longer needed
?.prop! (noNonNullAssertedOptionalChain) patterns existed — optional chain makes the non-null assertion contradictory and should be replaced with explicit null guards
tsc must be run as `cd crates/web/ui && npx tsc --noEmit` rather than npx --prefix because --prefix only sets install location, not working directory for tsconfig resolution

workflow: HTM tagged templates are opaque strings to TypeScript — migrating to JSX is required to get typed props, typed children, and attribute checking
Subagents hitting output token limits on large files (5000+ lines) silently produce no output — must check file existence after agent completes
Mechanical TS migration produces ~100+ `as` casts to silence tsc; a second pass replacing them with type guards and typed helpers provides the real safety gains
targetValue(e)/targetChecked(e) typed event helpers eliminate e.target as HTMLInputElement casts across form handlers
Generic S.$<T>() DOM accessor eliminates redundant casts at getElementById call sites
Biome a11y rules (useButtonType, noLabelWithoutControl) become newly visible after HTM→JSX migration because biome could not lint inside HTM template literals
Removing source maps from Vite build reduces committed dist/ from 27MB to 11MB

friction: YubiKey GPG signing required manual tap for every commit — automated sessions stall at pinentry prompts
git add -A accidentally staged unrelated in-progress Rust files (vault.rs, auth_routes.rs etc.) causing cargo check failures that required a revert commit
Subagent token limit on SettingsPage.tsx (5656 lines) caused silent failure — file was not created, requiring manual detection and split conversion
Subagents introduced hallucinated imports (sendChat from ChatPage in websocket.ts) that broke the Vite build
Subagents used kebab-case import paths (../components/session-header) instead of PascalCase filenames (SessionHeader.tsx), requiring manual fixup
npx --prefix does not set the working directory for tsc — initial local-validate tsc command was broken and required a fix
local-validate requires a pushed PR to run end-to-end; running it on an unpushed branch causes it to pick up stale PR context
Rate limits hit mid-session twice, requiring user to issue 'proceed' to resume work
open_items: 134 remaining `as HTML*Element` casts from querySelector/closest/createElement — eliminating them requires migrating imperative registerPage+DOM pages to Preact component trees
32 dynamic Record<string,unknown> usages in channel configs, ws frames, and gon data that need per-endpoint interface definitions as features are worked on
SettingsPage.tsx at 6855 lines — should be split into sub-page components in a future PR (file-size check only covers .rs files so CI does not enforce this)
Migrate remaining imperative pages (ChannelsPage, SettingsPage, ChatPage, onboarding-view) from registerPage+innerHTML pattern to Preact component trees for full type safety
Refine RpcMethodMap response types — many entries use unknown placeholders that should be replaced with concrete interfaces as individual endpoints are touched
E2E Playwright tests may need minor import path updates after the JS→TS rename
Consider adding vite build step to CI so the committed dist/ stays in sync with source changes
